positioning: Warm, modern, high-quality practice that serves both families and adults. Polished and capable, but not formal or exclusive. Premium comes from reputation, outcomes, patient experience, consistency, and expertise.
messagingBehavior: Leads with family trust and clinical confidence. Highlights expertise, outcomes, comfort, convenience, and technology. Polished but approachable. Confident quality without pretension. Premium accessible — not exclusive.
patientBase: Parents seeking a high-quality but accessible practice

typography.style: Modern, professional, approachable; clear contemporary hierarchy

imagery: Natural settings and modern clinic shots
Technology shown in a supportive role

divergenceContract.headlineType: Inter / Avenir Semi-Bold sans-serif — modern and clean. NEVER serif, never rounded-playful.
divergenceContract.layout: Contemporary balanced grid; one quality photo featured prominently; organized sections with warm (not tight, not sparse) spacing.
divergenceContract.color: Accent #2f855a (premium green) on white / light-neutral ground; warm, never cold or stark.
divergenceContract.imagery: Polished professional photography of modern families AND adults; genuine smiles; before/after with quality results; tech in a supporting role.
divergenceContract.signature: Polished modern family practice — premium that feels accessible. Reads as 'quality you can trust', never 'cheapest' and never 'exclusive/VIP'.
